title: Hush Now, Little Heart
poem_text:
Thump thump, beat so light,
Pitter pat, soft as night.
Sigh sigh, breath so deep,
Whisper words to help you sleep.
Rustle rustle, blanket warm,
Cuddle close and safe from harm.
Tick tock, steady clock,
Lullaby the world will rock.
Shhh shhh, hush now, dear,
All is calm—no need for fear.
cover_context: A cozy bedroom bathed in soft blue moonlight, with a child curled under a quilt, listening to the gentle sounds of the night.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, xylophone and soft claps, 103 BPM, cozy and reassuring, steady predictable rhythm, safe and warm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
